productDisplayName: Nike Men Elite Brown Sports Shoes
description: Combine a classic design with a comfortable Fit and lightweight feel, and what you get is the nike Elite SI shoe. UpperNylon mesh upper for absolute breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and durabilitynike swoosh overlays on the midfoot for enhanced style and midfoot supportPadded tongue and collar for snug comfortLace-up system for snug, customized fitMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for superior cushioning and lightweight comfortMildly padded sockliner for all-day comfort OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for superior grip and tractionShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
